move_outcome_value: {movement_rule_text} {overshoot_rule_text} Using the shown die, what square does the token finish on?
{movement_rule_text} {overshoot_rule_text} Read the die in the side panel. What is the token's final square?
{movement_rule_text} {overshoot_rule_text} After one shown roll, which numbered square is reached?
{movement_rule_text} {overshoot_rule_text} Apply the visible die value. What is the final square number?
{movement_rule_text} {overshoot_rule_text} Move once using the shown die; what square is the token on afterward?
ladder_count: How many ladders are visible on the board?
Count the visible ladders. How many are there?
How many ladder starts are shown on the board?
How many upward ladders are visible?
Count all visible ladders on this board.
snake_count: How many snakes are visible on the board?
Count the visible snakes. How many are there?
How many snake heads are shown on the board?
How many downward snakes are visible?
Count all visible snakes on this board.
remaining_to_finish_value: How many squares remain from the token's square to the final square?
Subtract the token's square number from the final square number. What is the result?
How far is the token from the final square by square number?
How many numbered squares are left between the token's current square and the finish?
What is the final square number minus the token's square number?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_standard_board: a numbered Snakes and Ladders board with one token and visible snakes and ladders
code_prompt_defaults.movement_rule_text: A move advances the token by the selected die value, then immediately follows a ladder upward or a snake downward if the landing square is the start of one. A ladder starts at its lower square and ends at the arrowhead on the higher square; a snake starts at its head and ends at its pointed tail on the lower square.
code_prompt_defaults.overshoot_rule_text: If a die roll would move past the final square, the token stays on its current square for that roll.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_move_outcome_value: set "annotation" to a JSON object mapping start_square and end_square to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_move_outcome_value: set "answer" to the final square number after the shown die roll and any snake or ladder
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_ladder_count: set "annotation" to a JSON array of bounding boxes [x0,y0,x1,y1] around every counted ladder-start square
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_ladder_count: set "answer" to the number of visible ladders
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_snake_count: set "annotation" to a JSON array of bounding boxes [x0,y0,x1,y1] around every counted snake-head square
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_snake_count: set "answer" to the number of visible snakes
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_remaining_to_finish_valu: set "annotation" to a JSON object mapping token_square and finish_square to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_remaining_to_finish_value: set "answer" to the final square number minus the token's square number
